title: Stock futures fall as oil prices rise; investors await key reading on inflation: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures declined as rising oil prices weighed on markets and investors awaited a critical inflation report from the Federal Reserve. The inflation data will likely influence the Fed's monetary policy decisions affecting borrowing costs and economic growth.
content: U.S. equity futures were lower on Sunday as Wall Street awaited the release of inflation data that is closely watched by the Federal Reserve.

zh.title: 油价上升导致股指期货下跌；投资者静待关键通胀数据：实时更新
zh.summary: 随着油价上升对市场施压，美国股指期货下跌，投资者静待美联储的关键通胀报告。这份通胀数据可能会影响美联储的货币政策决策，进而影响借贷成本和经济增长。

title: Is Germany looking again at coal-powered electricity?
summary: Germany may reconsider its commitment to eliminate coal power as surging natural gas prices make coal a more economically attractive option for electricity generation. This potential reversal highlights tensions between climate goals and energy cost pressures in Europe.
content: It had planned to abandon the fuel, but the higher cost of natural gas may make it think again.

zh.title: 德国是否再次考虑煤电?
zh.summary: 随着天然气价格暴涨使煤炭成为更具经济吸引力的发电选项，德国可能会重新考虑其承诺消除煤电的目标。这一潜在的政策反转凸显了欧洲气候目标与能源成本压力之间的矛盾。

title: Fake romance to missed deliveries: How to protect yourself from three common scams
summary: Romance and investment fraud have reached record levels, affecting consumers with false relationships and bogus investment opportunities. The article outlines protective measures consumers can take to avoid falling victim to these increasingly common scams.
content: Romance and investment fraud is at record levels but what can you do to prevent being caught out.

zh.title: 虚假爱情到未送达包裹：如何保护自己免受三种常见诈骗
zh.summary: 爱情和投资欺诈已达到创纪录水平，以虚假关系和虚假投资机会影响消费者。该文章概述了消费者可以采取的保护措施，以避免成为这些日益常见的诈骗的受害者。

title: 'I couldn't sleep when I heard the last bank would close'
summary: An 84-year-old woman expressed her distress over the closure of the last bank in her Scottish town of Lochgilphead, highlighting the growing problem of rural financial access. The closure exemplifies the broader issue of banking deserts in isolated communities.
content: When 84-year-old Maggie Dodd discovered that the last remaining bank in Lochgilphead was closing, she began to panic.

zh.title: 当我听说最后一家银行要关闭时，我无法入睡
zh.summary: 一位84岁的苏格兰妇女对其家乡洛赫吉尔珀德镇最后一家银行的关闭表示悲伤，突显了农村金融可及性的日益恶化问题。这家银行的关闭反映了孤立社区中银行沙漠现象的更广泛问题。

title: Serena Williams to play singles at Wimbledon via wild card
summary: 44-year-old Serena Williams received a wild card to compete in singles at Wimbledon while also entering the doubles draw with her sister Venus. This marks a significant moment in Williams' continued athletic career following her previous retirement from competitive tennis.
content: Williams, 44, will compete with her sister Venus in doubles, as the pair also accepted a wild-card entry into that draw.

zh.title: 塞蕾娜·威廉姆斯将通过外卡参加温布尔顿网球公开赛单打比赛
zh.summary: 44岁的塞蕾娜·威廉姆斯获得外卡参加温布尔顿网球公开赛单打比赛，同时还参加了与姐姐维纳斯的双打比赛。这标志着威廉姆斯在之前退休后职业网球生涯的继续中的一个重要时刻。

title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
summary: Lawmakers are mobilizing millions of dollars to address a growing loneliness crisis after research shows it poses health risks comparable to smoking and obesity. This public health initiative reflects growing recognition of loneliness's serious impact on population health.
content: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity

zh.title: 孤独危机已经恶化到立法者准备投入数百万美元来解决它的程度
zh.summary: 在研究表明孤独症对健康的危害相当于吸烟和肥胖症之后，立法者们正在投入数百万美元来应对日益加剧的孤独危机。这一公共卫生倡议反映了人们对孤独症对人口健康的严重影响的日益认识。

title: Wowcher sorry for 'unacceptable' crocodile attack email
summary: Discount site Wowcher apologized for a controversial marketing email that appeared to reference a crocodile incident involving a toddler at a zoo. The company acknowledged the content as "unacceptable" and inappropriate for promotional materials.
content: The firm's marketing email appeared to reference an incident involving a toddler at a zoo.

zh.title: Wowcher为"不可接受的"鳄鱼攻击电子邮件道歉
zh.summary: 折扣网站Wowcher为一封有争议的营销电子邮件道歉，该电子邮件似乎涉及一起在动物园中涉及幼童的鳄鱼事件。该公司承认该内容"不可接受"，不适合用于宣传材料。

title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
summary: A homeowner is investing $170,000 in home modifications to accommodate aging and disabled parents, exploring potential tax deductions for disability-related improvements. The question highlights how families can offset costs of accessibility upgrades while caring for elderly relatives.
content: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”

zh.title: 我正在花费170,000美元升级我的房屋以容纳我年迈的父母。我能获得税收优惠吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主投资170,000美元进行家居改造以适应年迈和残疾的父母，探索残疾相关改善的潜在税收抵免。这个问题突出了家庭在照顾老年亲属的同时如何抵消无障碍升级成本。

title: The AI trade has left the hyperscalers in the dust. What will it take for that to change?
summary: Artificial intelligence investments in memory and semiconductor equipment companies have significantly outperformed major tech hyperscalers, according to Jim Cramer's analysis. The column explores what conditions might trigger a rebalancing in investor favor toward large cloud computing giants.
content: In his Sunday column for Investing Club subscribers, Jim Cramer examines the market's love affair with memory and semi-cap equipment stocks.

zh.title: 人工智能交易已经把超大规模云计算企业远远甩在身后。什么才能改变这一切？
zh.summary: 根据吉姆·克莱默的分析，人工智能在内存和半导体设备公司的投资表现远超主要科技巨头。该专栏探讨了哪些条件可能触发投资者对大型云计算巨头的重新青睐。

title: Trump threatens Iran with fresh strikes as Vance leads peace talks in Switzerland
summary: VP Vance is leading peace talks in Switzerland, marking the first diplomatic discussions under a new memorandum of understanding signed a week ago. Trump has simultaneously threatened Iran with fresh military strikes, creating tension between diplomatic engagement and military posturing.
content: The talks in Switzerland were the first to be held under the terms of a memorandum of understanding agreed a week ago.

zh.title: 范斯在瑞士主导和平谈判之际，特朗普威胁对伊朗进行新的军事打击
zh.summary: 副总统范斯正在瑞士主导和平谈判，这是一周前签署的新谅解备忘录框架下的首次外交讨论。与此同时，特朗普威胁对伊朗进行新的军事打击，在外交接触和军事姿态之间造成了紧张局势。

title: Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' lassos biggest opening weekend in franchise history with $160 million haul
summary: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" debuted with $160 million domestically, setting a franchise record for opening weekend earnings. The strong performance signals continued audience appetite for the beloved animated series.
content: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.

zh.title: 皮克斯《玩具总动员5》以1.6亿美元首周末票房创特许经营系列纪录
zh.summary: 迪士尼和皮克斯的《玩具总动员5》以1.6亿美元的国内票房首周末成绩创下系列纪录。这个亮眼的成绩表明观众对这部深受喜爱的动画系列仍有持续的热情。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
summary: A 67-year-old homeowner with $100,000 annual income and $950,000 in savings seeks advice on whether to claim $30,000 yearly Social Security benefits immediately or delay. The question highlights the complex financial decisions retirees face regarding benefit timing and income management.
content: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

zh.title: 我们拥有自己的房屋：我今年67岁，年收入10万美元。我现在申请3万美元年社会保障金还是等待？
zh.summary: 一位67岁的房主，年收入10万美元，储蓄95万美元，正在寻求关于是否立即申领年社会保障金3万美元或延迟申领的建议。这个问题突出了退休人员在福利时机和收入管理方面面临的复杂财务决策。

title: She saved $24,000 to launch a craft festival in an old Joann store: 'This is my dream come true'
summary: An experienced events producer invested $24,000 of her own savings to launch a craft festival inside a former Joann store location. The project represents her vision of creating a community space where people can gather to create handmade goods together.
content: "This is my dream come true," says Tetef, a long-time events producer. "I just want to go to a thing where everyone's sitting down making stuff."

zh.title: 她存了2.4万美元在一家旧乔安手工店推出工艺品节："这是我的梦想成真"
zh.summary: 一位经验丰富的活动策划者投入了自己的2.4万美元积蓄，在一家前乔安手工店的原址推出手工艺节。该项目代表了她的愿景——创造一个社区空间，让人们可以聚在一起制作手工艺品。

title: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
summary: Minimum wage increases have historically been successful ballot initiatives, but recent electoral losses suggest the political climate may be shifting as economic concerns grow. The changing outcome indicates voters' priorities may be evolving in response to broader economic conditions.
content: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.

zh.title: 提高最低工资一直是大的政治胜利，现在它正面临阻力
zh.summary: 最低工资增长在历史上一直是成功的投票倡议，但最近的选举失败表明，随着经济担忧的增长，政治气候可能正在转变。结果的变化表明投票者的优先事项可能在根据更广泛的经济条件而演变。

title: Micron’s earnings are a must-watch market event — with profit growth approaching 1,000%
summary: Semiconductor manufacturer Micron is experiencing extraordinary profit growth nearing 1,000%, with gains coming primarily from margin expansion rather than volume increases. The company's outsized earnings growth is beginning to meaningfully impact broader market indices like the S&P 500.
content: Micron’s massive growth is “coming at nearly pure profit,” and that’s starting to have real implications for the S&P 500.

zh.title: 美光的收益是必看的市场事件——利润增长接近1000%
zh.summary: 半导体制造商美光正在经历接近1000%的非凡利润增长，增长主要来自利润率扩张而不是产量增加。该公司的超额收益增长开始对标普500等更广泛的市场指数产生有意义的影响。

title: My two sons will inherit a $30,000 annuity from their grandmother. What should I do with the money?
summary: A parent seeks guidance on managing a $30,000 inherited annuity for their two sons with a five-year withdrawal window. The question addresses strategies for maximizing inherited retirement assets for young beneficiaries.
content: “My understanding is that they have five years to withdraw the money.”

zh.title: 我的两个儿子将从他们的祖母那里继承一份价值3万美元的年金。我应该怎么处理这笔钱？
zh.summary: 一位家长寻求关于为其两个儿子管理从祖母处继承的3万美元年金的指导，该年金有五年的提取期限。这个问题涉及最大化年轻受益人继承退休资产的策略。

title: The No. 1 trick I always teach to build unshakeable confidence—it worked for Beyoncé and Adele
summary: Therapist Amy Morin shares a confidence-building technique involving channeling an alter ego, a method reportedly used by performers like Beyoncé and Adele. The approach helps overcome self-doubt that can undermine even talented and well-prepared individuals.
content: "No matter how talented or prepared you are, self-doubt can get in your way," says therapist Amy Morin. Here's how to channel your alter ego so you can do your best.

zh.title: 我总是教授建立坚定信心的第一招——它对碧昂丝和阿黛尔有效
zh.summary: 治疗师艾米·莫林分享了一种建立信心的技巧，涉及塑造另一个自我，这是碧昂丝和阿黛尔等表演者据说使用的方法。这种方法有助于克服自我怀疑，自我怀疑可能会破坏即使是才华横溢和准备充分的个人。

title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
summary: SpaceX is exploring orbital AI data centers as an alternative to ground-based facilities that face growing public opposition. However, the economic viability of space-based data centers remains questionable despite the political appeal of avoiding terrestrial locations.
content: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.

zh.title: 没人想要地球上的AI数据中心。它们在太空中有意义吗?
zh.summary: SpaceX正在探索轨道AI数据中心作为地面设施的替代方案,这些地面设施面临着日益增长的公众反对。然而,尽管避免地面位置在政治上具有吸引力,但基于太空的数据中心的经济可行性仍然值得怀疑。

title: Republicans buy crypto more than Democrats, data shows — what's driving the divide
summary: Data reveals a significant partisan gap in cryptocurrency adoption, with Republicans purchasing substantially more crypto than Democrats. The analysis explores the underlying factors driving this notable political divide in digital asset investment behavior.
content: "There's a massive, massive partisan gap," of crypto adoption between Democrats and Republicans. Here's why.

zh.title: 数据显示共和党人比民主党人购买更多加密货币——是什么驱动了这种分裂?
zh.summary: 数据显示加密货币采用中存在明显的党派差异,共和党人购买的加密货币远多于民主党人。分析探讨了驱动数字资产投资行为中这一显著政治分裂的潜在因素。

title: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
summary: Under Federal Reserve leadership, potential interest rate hikes may not derail the current bull market, with stock gains potentially continuing even if such hikes are implemented. Historical rate-hike cycles provide insight into how markets typically respond to monetary tightening.
content: Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does, and past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.

zh.title: 在沃什领导下,这个牛市不会因为美联储加息而结束
zh.summary: 在美联储领导下,潜在的利率上升可能不会阻碍当前的牛市,即使实施了此类上升,股票收益也可能继续增长。历史加息周期提供了对市场通常如何应对货币紧缩的洞察。

title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
summary: A frugal couple with financial resources seeks advice on supporting adult children who may struggle with financial independence due to mental health challenges. The dilemma reflects the tension between parental support and fostering adult children's self-sufficiency.
content: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse.”

zh.title: 我们习惯上很节俭：我和妻子有钱。我们如何在不破坏孩子独立性的情况下帮助他们？
zh.summary: 一对拥有经济资源的节俭夫妇寻求关于支持成年子女的建议，这些成年子女可能因心理健康问题而在经济独立上遇到困难。这个困境反映了父母支持与促进成年子女自给自足之间的矛盾。

title: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
summary: Key market events this week include FedEx earnings and the release of the Fed's preferred inflation gauge, both of which could influence investor sentiment and market movements.
content: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.

zh.title: 股市本周需要关注的3个重大事项
zh.summary: 本周关键市场事件包括联邦快递的财报和美联储首选通胀指标的公布，这两者都可能影响投资者情绪和市场走势。

title: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
summary: Dr. Becky Kennedy outlines a 3-step formula parents and leaders can use to help others manage uncertainty by reframing situations positively. The approach focuses on communication rather than controlling outcomes.
content: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.

zh.title: 贝基·肯尼迪博士表示，最优秀的父母和领导者使用3步公式帮助他人应对不确定性
zh.summary: 贝基·肯尼迪博士概述了父母和领导者可以使用的3步公式，通过积极改进来帮助他人管理不确定性。该方法侧重于沟通而非控制结果。

title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
summary: A 60-year-old waiter with only $2,000 in retirement savings expresses fear about their financial future and ability to retire. The article examines the challenges facing late-career workers with minimal retirement assets.
content: “I’m afraid I’m in a bad place.”

zh.title: "我可能会工作到死"：我60岁，做服务员，罗斯IRA账户只有2000美元。我会怎样？
zh.summary: 一位只有2000美元退休储蓄的60岁服务员表达了对其财务未来和退休能力的担忧。本文审视了拥有最少退休资产的晚期职业工作者面临的挑战。

title: The secret to wellness is simple: Eat this breakfast and work out at the right time
summary: Contrary to popular timing-based wellness advice, research suggests what you eat for breakfast matters more than when you eat it. The focus on nutrition composition over meal timing offers a simpler approach to wellness.
content: The key to a healthy breakfast is less about when you eat it and more about what you eat.

zh.title: 健康的秘诀很简单：吃对早餐，在对的时间锻炼
zh.summary: 与流行的时间相关健康建议相反，研究表明早餐吃什么比何时吃更重要。专注于营养成分而非进餐时间为健康提供了更简单的方法。

title: UK minister says PM Starmer is considering 'political realities' amid leadership pressure
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces mounting leadership pressure after former Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a parliamentary seat. Government ministers cite "political realities" as the PM considers his position.
content: The threat to Starmer's position increased sharply on Friday when former Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a seat in parliament.

zh.title: 英国部长表示首相斯塔默在面临领导力压力下考虑"政治现实"
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默在前大曼彻斯特市长安迪·伯纳姆赢得议会席位后面临越来越大的领导力压力。政府部长引用"政治现实"，称首相正在考虑其职位。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
summary: Top Wall Street analysts have identified three dividend-paying stocks recommended by TipRanks as attractive investments for stable returns. The analysis highlights dividend-paying equities favored by leading market experts.
content: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks.

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师看好这3只分红股票获得稳健回报
zh.summary: 顶级华尔街分析师已确定了TipRanks推荐的三只分红股票作为稳定回报的吸引力投资。该分析突出了领先市场专家青睐的分红股票。

title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
summary: Kevin Warsh is quietly reshaping the Federal Reserve through announced changes and task forces designed to fundamentally rethink Fed operations. The reforms represent significant institutional change implemented with minimal public attention.
content: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.

zh.title: "穿着天鹅绒手套的政权更替"：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什通过宣布的改革和特别工作组，悄悄地重塑美联储，旨在从根本上重新思考美联储的运作方式。这些改革代表了在最少公众关注下实施的重大制度变革。
